summary: Validated requested P0 regression scope on public preview URL: worker backend login, frontend worker login routing into worker tabs, DELETE /api/auth/users/{id} for a temporary non-admin user, and health endpoint. All requested checks passed.

react_native_issues.issue: Console repeatedly logs deprecated React Native web style warning: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.'

action_items: Optional hardening: replace deprecated shadow style props with boxShadow-compatible styling for web output.
Config consistency: frontend currently uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in code; align with the project playbook variable convention if required by deployment policy.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses fallback defaults for APP_URL and DB_NAME; project rules prefer fail-fast env-only configuration for deployment stability.
frontend login/auth context use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL directly; functional but not fully aligned with strict env naming guidance in playbook.
seed_data_creation: Created one temporary user (TEST_temp_delete_*) for delete regression test and removed it in-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worker credentials tested successfully on public preview URL. After login, worker saw Werkbonnen/Planning/Berichten/Profiel tabs and did not see Beheer tab (as expected for non-admin role). /api/health returned healthy + database connected.
rca_of_issue: No functional blocker found in requested scope. Only non-blocking Expo web deprecation warnings observed in frontend logs.
